description: Darius Star project automation tasks — zero dependencies, Python stdlib only

generate-audio.description: Generate all audio tracks via Lyria 2 (Vertex AI)

flags.--track <id>: Generate a single track by ID

lint-audio.description: Cross-reference audio_manifest.json against files on disk; validate all MP3/WAV files

flags.--fix: Update manifest to match disk state

deploy.description: Push to master → Cloudflare Pages auto-deploys
deploy.note: Push can take 3-10 min (repo ~11GB). Run in background.
